subject: Human Resources
title: Leave and Time-Off Policies
description: Learn Leave and Time-Off Policies in one minute.

hook.text: One employee gets three weeks of vacation. A colleague with the same role gets two. Nobody knows why.

buildup.text: Leave policies define vacation, sick leave, parental leave, bereavement, and other time-off categories.

discovery.text: Clear policies ensure fairness and compliance with laws like FMLA, which mandates unpaid medical leave.

twist.text: 'Unlimited PTO' sounds generous—but studies show employees actually take less time off under these policies.

climax.text: Well-designed leave policies balance employee well-being with operational needs—neither should be sacrificed.

punchline.text: Fair time off keeps people from burning out.

quiz.question: What's a surprising effect of unlimited PTO policies?
options: Employees often take less time off
Employees take too much time off
It eliminates the need for HR
